Built for Working with AI

Focus on your ideas while AI helps with writing and formatting

    Fast Drafting

    Create your first draft quickly with AI assistance, from business reports to creative writing.

    AI-Powered Writing

    Update your document by telling AI what you want - no more manual formatting and editing.

    Easy Import

    Import content from files, websites, and YouTube videos to enrich your documents.

    Work together with your team in real-time, making document creation a collaborative experience.

TRUSTED BY LEADING TEAMS

SIMPLE & EFFICIENT

How It Works

Unlike traditional editors, Autocaret is built for working with AI, making document creation faster and easier.

1

Choose a Template

Start with professionally designed templates that match your specific document needs.

2

Iterate using AI

Simply tell AI what you want to write about. Focus on your ideas while AI helps with the writing and formatting.

3

Enhance & Collaborate

Import content from files, websites, and videos. Work together with your team in real-time to refine the document.
